main_problems: Estimate requests go unanswered for days — homeowners get quotes from faster competitors
No follow-up sequence for prospects who got an estimate but didn't close
Completed project clients are never asked for reviews or referrals
Project update communication relies entirely on the owner calling — clients feel out of the loop
Permit and milestone tracking is manual — no automated reminders to clients or crew

recommended_automations.name: Estimate Request Fast-Response
recommended_automations.description: When a chatbot or web form estimate request comes in, an automated SMS fires within 5 minutes: 'Hi [name], this is Keystone Building & Contracting — we received your request for a [project type] estimate. We'll reach out within the hour to schedule your free site visit.' Followed by email confirmation.
recommended_automations.trigger: Chatbot estimate lead captured or web form submitted
recommended_automations.estimated_value: Speed of response is the #1 factor in winning contractor leads — same-minute reply wins bids

recommended_automations.name: Estimate Follow-Up Sequence (Non-Closers)
recommended_automations.description: Prospects who received an estimate but haven't signed get a 3-touch follow-up: Day 3 SMS ('Just checking in on your [project] estimate — any questions?'), Day 7 email with project portfolio, Day 14 final SMS ('We have availability starting [month] — want to lock in your spot?').
recommended_automations.trigger: Estimate delivered but no contract signed within 3 days
recommended_automations.estimated_value: Converts 15–25% of fence-sitters who just needed a follow-up

recommended_automations.name: Project Milestone Update Texts
recommended_automations.description: When a project milestone is logged (demo complete, framing done, rough-in inspected, etc.), an automated SMS goes to the client: 'Update from Keystone: [milestone] is complete. Next step is [next step]. We'll keep you posted!' Keeps clients informed without calls.
recommended_automations.trigger: Project milestone logged by owner or crew (via simple form or SMS trigger)
recommended_automations.estimated_value: Eliminates 80% of 'just checking in' calls — dramatically improves client satisfaction

recommended_automations.name: Post-Project Review + Referral Request
recommended_automations.description: 1 week after project completion, send SMS: 'Your [project] at [address] is wrapped up — it was a pleasure! If you're happy with the work, a Google review would mean a lot to our team. [LINK] And if you know anyone looking for a contractor, we'd be grateful for the referral.'
recommended_automations.estimated_value: 1–2 referred projects per month = $10,000–$50,000 additional revenue annually

recommended_automations.name: New Lead → Owner Alert + CRM Log
recommended_automations.description: Every chatbot lead, web form submission, or missed call is logged to Google Sheets with name, phone, project type, location, source, and timestamp. Owner receives an immediate SMS alert for every new estimate request.
recommended_automations.estimated_value: No more missed opportunities — every lead is tracked and owner is notified in real-time

expected_outcomes.non_closer_conversion: 15–25% of cold estimates closed from follow-up

implementation_timeline: 5–7 business days to build and test
